title: Fix New Objects Showing Placeholder Notes Instead of Empty
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want newly added objects to show empty notes fields instead of placeholder text, so that the data dictionary looks clean.
description: When new objects were added to the scorecard, the notes field displayed placeholder/template text instead of being empty. Fixed for new objects; existing records with placeholder text were left as-is.
acceptance_criteria: New objects show empty notes fields
No placeholder text appears in notes for newly added objects
ux_changes: New objects display empty notes fields instead of placeholder text.
middleware_changes: Object creation logic updated to not pre-fill notes with placeholder text.
implementation_notes: Fix applied to new objects only. Old records with placeholder text not retroactively updated.
comment_summary: Waqar fixed for new objects. Ryan confirmed no need to fix old records.
